name: Bassem Youssef
blurb: He rose to prominence hosting the satirical show El Bernameg from 2011 to 2014, and later built an international stand-up career touring his show Late for Democracy.
bio: Bassem Youssef is an Egyptian-American comedian, television host and former cardiothoracic surgeon, often called Egypts Jon Stewart. He rose to prominence hosting the satirical show El Bernameg from 2011 to 2014, and later built an international stand-up career touring his show Late for Democracy.

timeline.ev: Launches The B+ Show during the Egyptian revolution
Begins hosting the satirical TV show El Bernameg
El Bernameg ends amid political pressure
Profiled in the documentary Tickling Giants; publishes Revolution For Dummies
Tours the stand-up show Late for Democracy internationally

accolades: Host of the 43rd International Emmy Awards (2015)
Subject of the documentary Tickling Giants (2017)
Named to the Time 100 most influential people (2013)

appearances.t: Just For Laughs: Lowkey Comedy Vancouver

bits.sp: Just For Laughs: Lowkey Comedy Vancouver

flags.bits_honest_gap_note: Only one embeddable official STAND-UP clip exists (Just For Laughs Matt Rife roast). Youssef is banned from Egypt and his touring shows (Late for Democracy, The Middle Beast) have no officially-clipped stand-up on YouTube. His own channel @bassemyoussefofficial is political commentary / SNL-reaction content (not stand-up); the 'President'/'Operation' stand-up clips are non-embeddable or hosted on a third-party venue channel (ASU Gammage); festival and press uploads (Dubai Comedy Festival, Khaleej Times, Oxford/Hist Q&As) are interviews. Could not reach 3 stand-up bits without violating embeddability/official/standup rules.

bits.yt_title: Bassem Youssef Roasts Matt Rife | Lowkey Comedy: Vancouver
